sourcesContent:
export interface Game {
  _id: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  price: number;
  originalPrice?: number;
  discount?: number;
  category: string;
  platform: string;
  image: string;
  images: string[];
  availability: string;
  region: string;
  isNew?: boolean;
}

export const mockGames: Game[] = [
  {
    _id: '1',
    title: 'Fortnite - Account Level 150',
    description: 'حساب Fortnite بمستوى 150 مع شخصيات نادرة',
    price: 299.99,
    originalPrice: 399.99,
    discount: 25,
    category: 'battle-royale',
    platform: 'PC',
    image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/FF6B6B/FFFFFF?text=Fortnite',
    images: [
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/FF6B6B/FFFFFF?text=Fortnite',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/FF6B6B/FFFFFF?text=Fortnite+2',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/FF6B6B/FFFFFF?text=Fortnite+3',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/FF6B6B/FFFFFF?text=Fortnite+4',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/FF6B6B/FFFFFF?text=Fortnite+5'
    ],
    availability: 'available',
    region: 'Global',
    isNew: true
  },
  {
    _id: '2',
    title: 'PUBG Mobile - Max Level Account',
    description: 'حساب PUBG Mobile بأعلى مستوى وكل الأسلحة',
    price: 199.99,
    originalPrice: 299.99,
    discount: 33,
    category: 'battle-royale',
    platform: 'Mobile',
    image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/4ECDC4/FFFFFF?text=PUBG',
    images: [
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/4ECDC4/FFFFFF?text=PUBG',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/4ECDC4/FFFFFF?text=PUBG+2',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/4ECDC4/FFFFFF?text=PUBG+3',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/4ECDC4/FFFFFF?text=PUBG+4',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/4ECDC4/FFFFFF?text=PUBG+5'
    ],
    availability: 'available',
    region: 'Middle East',
    isNew: false
  },
  {
    _id: '3',
    title: 'Call of Duty Warzone - Premium Account',
    description: 'حساب COD Warzone مع كل الباقات المميزة',
    price: 149.99,
    originalPrice: 199.99,
    discount: 25,
    category: 'fps',
    platform: 'PC',
    image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/45B7D1/FFFFFF?text=COD',
    images: [
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/45B7D1/FFFFFF?text=COD',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/45B7D1/FFFFFF?text=COD+2',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/45B7D1/FFFFFF?text=COD+3',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/45B7D1/FFFFFF?text=COD+4',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/45B7D1/FFFFFF?text=COD+5'
    ],
    availability: 'available',
    region: 'Europe',
    isNew: false
  },
  {
    _id: '4',
    title: 'GTA V Online - Rich Account',
    description: 'حساب GTA V Online مع أموال غير محدودة',
    price: 89.99,
    originalPrice: 149.99,
    discount: 40,
    category: 'open-world',
    platform: 'Console',
    image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/96CEB4/FFFFFF?text=GTA',
    images: [
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/96CEB4/FFFFFF?text=GTA',
      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/96CEB4/FFFFFF?text=GTA+2',

      'https://via.placeholder.com/300x200/96CEB4/FFFFFF?text=GTA+5'
    ],
    availability: 'available',
    region: 'USA',
    isNew: false
  }
];
